name: Snack Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large bowl, combine the first five ingredients.
2. In a saucepan over low heat, cook and stir marshmallows and butter until melted.
3. Add honey and mix well.
4. Pour the marshmallow mixture over the cereal mixture; mix thoroughly.
5. Stir in chips, M&Ms, or raisins if desired.
6. Press two-thirds of the mixture into a greased 15 x 10 x 1-inch pan and the remaining third into a 9-inch square pan.
7. Cool completely before cutting into bars. Yield: 4-5 dozen.
